title: View Functionality on Mobile
excerpt:
Hi there, 
We are sharing a board online and it looks perfect on the web browser, however, when trying to view the board on mobile, it’s practically impossible to read as the columns take up all the space. Is there a way…

posts.author: cosmiq (Sean Scales)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We are sharing a board online and it looks perfect on the web browser, however, when trying to view the board on mobile, it’s practically impossible to read as the columns take up all the space. Is there a way to alter the view so the information is still viewable on mobile? Thank you!
